image:image.image:title: Vivijure: make films with AI, on your own terms

video:video.video:title: NEON HALFLIFE, a silent Vivijure film (own-GPU Wan i2v)
video:video.video:description: The first film rendered end to end on Vivijure: 1080p, ten shots, about thirty seconds, animated on a self-hosted GPU with the own-GPU Wan image-to-video backend. Silent by design.

video:video.video:title: FUR AND CIRCUITS, a scored Vivijure film (Seedance cloud i2v)
video:video.video:description: Eight shots scored with a generated music bed beat-synced to the edit. Motion on Seedance cloud image-to-video; two character LoRAs trained from cast portraits.

video:video.video:title: RUST, a narrated Vivijure film (Kling cloud i2v)
video:video.video:description: Three shots narrated with TTS generated directly from the storyboard text. Motion on Kling cloud image-to-video; two character LoRAs.

video:video.video:title: Vivijure Speaks, a talking-character Vivijure film (lip-sync + upscale)
video:video.video:description: A talking character lip-synced to its own dialogue and upscaled: per-shot dialogue TTS, then the MuseTalk lip-sync module and a CUDA Real-ESRGAN pass. Motion on a self-hosted GPU.
